Reviewer gates PASS (mean>=4.2, weak<=20%) but release.status=blocked due to stale full-enhancement-results.latest.json (pass rate 94.4% from 2026-04-12 run on different 18-prompt pool).

Reviewer loop converged at mean=4.211, wbv=0.8631, 1 holdout weak (p19). Remaining automated work: refresh local surface validation artifacts and, if green, write marketplace artifact + sync description. Context window near limit; handing back to user.
tool_selection_error: ROUTING CONTRACT preamble on search_and_get_outcomes + compare_event_outcome_quotes. q11 passed in improver targeted rerun; q1 remained flaky (1/5 pass).
full-enhancement-results.latest.json: 44% (8/18), regressed from 56%. 10 prompts clarify with 0 tool calls.
Reviewer gates green, surface harness regressed. Handing back to user.

Resumed per user request targeting q1/q11 only. Confirmed on disk: both failures are issueClass=scope_ambiguity with actionsTaken=[inspect_current_grounding, clarify_scope], toolCalls=0, loopCount=0. q1: upstream resolution DID succeed (resolved to PSG vs Bayern München) and runtime chose scope clarification over answer-with-substitute. q11: low-confidence match and runtime bailed before invoking search_and_get_outcomes. Both happen at the pre-planner orchestration scope-gate under clarificationPolicy=return; planner never reaches tool-selection stage so iter3's ROUTING CONTRACT preamble on tool descriptions cannot help. Reviewer pipeline (clarificationPolicy=auto) already answers q1/q11 with tool calls — the failure is specific to the surface-check harness.

Declined to spawn another improver iteration. Server.ts has no lever to prevent the runtime's pre-planner scope_ambiguity gate from firing — tool descriptions and tool outputs are never consulted at that stage. Iter3 already proved adding more ROUTING CONTRACT wording regresses surface rate (56% -> 44%). Further server.ts churn would repeat the iter2/iter3 pattern the user explicitly told me to stop.

Recommend Option A: change run-marketplace-surface-checks.mjs autoQueryChecks to clarificationPolicy='auto' (1-line change, matches run-pipeline-queries.mjs and real marketplace traffic). This will green q1/q11 by letting the runtime auto-select the recommended option and invoke search_and_get_outcomes / compare_event_outcome_quotes, which already succeed under 'auto' in the reviewer pipeline. Option B (runtime fix to scope-gate) is the principled fix but belongs in context-app, not in this contributor's release pipeline.
